allow: Bash(mv "_example - contains duplicate \(inactive\).md" "_example - contains duplicate \(done - rusty\).md")

PowerShell($utf8 = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; $f = "c:\\Users\\gatch\\OneDrive\\recruiting-vault\\01_technicals\\01_patterns\\07_trees\\hub - trees.md"; $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f, $utf8\); Write-Output "BYTES_LEN: $\($c.Length\)"; Write-Output "HAS flashcard tag: $\($c -match '\(?m\)^  - flashcard$'\)"; Write-Output "HAS pattern-hub tag: $\($c -match '\(?m\)^  - pattern-hub$'\)"; Write-Output "HAS cross-pattern: $\($c -match '\(?m\)^## cross-pattern connections$'\)"; Write-Output "---"; $c2 = $c -replace "\(?m\)^  - pattern-hub$", "  - pattern-hub`n  - flashcard"; Write-Output "AFTER REPLACE — has flashcard? $\($c2 -match '\(?m\)^  - flashcard$'\)"; Write-Output \($c2.Substring\(0, 120\)\))

PowerShell($utf8 = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; $f = "c:\\Users\\gatch\\OneDrive\\recruiting-vault\\01_technicals\\01_patterns\\07_trees\\hub - trees.md"; $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f, $utf8\); Write-Output "TEST1 \(single-quoted\): $\($c -match '\(?m\)^  - pattern-hub$'\)"; Write-Output "TEST2 \(anchor only\): $\($c -match '  - pattern-hub'\)"; Write-Output "TEST3 \(multiline mode\): $\($c -match '\(?ms\)^  - pattern-hub$'\)")
